videos.headline: Utah picks up season-opening win over Florida
videos.description: Without star quarterback Cam Rising, Utah uses defense and timely plays to take down Florida 24-11.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Utah picks up season-opening win over Florida) 2023/09/01 ESHEET SOTFULL

videos.headline: Utah scores 70-yard TD on its first play
videos.description: Bryson Barnes hurls it deep to Money Parks, who snags it and runs it in for a 70-yard Utah touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Utah scores 70-yard TD on their first play) 2023/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida falters in red zone, comes away empty-handed
videos.description: Florida lines up for a 4th-and-1 in the red zone and commits a false start, leading to a field goal attempt, which is missed.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida falters in red zone, comes away empty-handed) 2023/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida gifts Utah a first down with an equipment violation
videos.description: Florida gets a penalty and gives Utah a first down for having two players wearing the No. 3 on the field.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida gifts Utah a first down with an equipment violation) 2023/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Utah's Nate Johnson accelerates into end zone for a TD
videos.description: Utah scores its second touchdown of the night as Nate Johnson keeps it and scrambles in from 27 yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Utah's Nate Johnson accelerates into end zone for a TD) 2023/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sione Vaki sets up Utah in great field position with an INT
videos.description: Utah's Sione Vaki tips it up in the air and catches it himself for the interception early in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sione Vaki sets up Utah in great field position with an INT) 2023/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bryson Barnes scrambles for 5-yard Utah TD
videos.description: Bryson Barnes extends Utah's lead as he buys time in the pocket, then scrambles into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bryson Barnes scrambles for 5-yard Utah TD) 2023/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Utah sacks Graham Mertz on fourth down to get the ball back
videos.description: Florida turns it over on downs as Utah's Jonah Elliss gets in the backfield and sacks Graham Mertz.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Utah sacks Graham Mertz on fourth down to get the ball back) 2023/08/31 ESHEET

videos.headline: Caleb Douglas Mosses a defender for a Florida TD
videos.description: Florida gets its first touchdown of the season as Caleb Douglas goes over a defender for a sweet catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Caleb Douglas Mosses a defender for a Florida TD) 2023/08/31 ESHEET
